must_detect.matched_text:
Controller: Meridian Green Metals SE; Processors: CloudForge GmbH (hosting, Euravia-East region), Atlas Metrics Oy (ESG analytics); Subprocessors restricted to EU/EFTA with prior notice.
Scope of PII under GDPR includes shareholder registry and employee HR data; Art 9 data is not intentionally collected beyond limited occupational health attestations required by law and is minimised and shielded from analytics workflows.
Lawful bases: contractual necessity and legal obligation for registry and MAR records; consent only for optional newsletters; consent withdrawals are actioned via Form DCW-07 and there are currently no open withdrawals.
DSARs are received via the portal at privacy.meridian-green.example; no DSARs are pending and one erasure request was completed on 2026-04-12 under Art 17 with audit trail retained.
Cross-border transfer: Data Export Approval EU-XB-214 authorised a one-off export of limited HR contact fields to Nuvania (no adequacy decision) using 2021 SCCs (Module Two) and a documented TIA; export completed and no ongoing replication is configured.
Technical and organisational measures for EU-XB-214 include encryption in transit and at rest, key control by Meridian, and access limited to role accounts; no onward transfers to additional third countries are permitted.
Retention schedule (policy-only): insider lists (EU MAR) retained 5 years after last update; HR files retained 6 years; investor communications logs retained 3 years; retention holds may apply for regulatory preservation and are recorded in RH-LOG-09.
Data minimisation: analytics receives pseudonymised user IDs and hashed emails; special-category elements are redacted at source and logging excludes full IP addresses by default.
MAR governance: insider lists maintained in SecureSheet with time-stamping; PDMR dealings pre-cleared under the Closed Period Policy; this note contains no inside information and references only public, previously announced matters.
CSRD/SFDR workflows: sustainability KPIs are aggregated at entity level; personal data is excluded from external ESG API calls; due diligence records are access-controlled and not exported outside the EU without a fresh approval.
Localisation: primary processing region is Euravia-East; disaster recovery is within EU/EFTA only; subprocessor changes require 30 days’ notice and a right to object.
Placeholders for illustration only: ISIN ZZ-TEST-000000, Account ACCT-XXXX-0000, Ticket REF-NIL-123; these are invalid and non-live and should not be treated as active identifiers.
International transfer posture: UK destinations are treated as adequate; US destinations are restricted and the legacy EU–US pipeline was decommissioned in Q4 2025; no cookies used for cross-border analytics.
